message.content: Add a --dry-run flag to the migrate command so users can preview what would change before committing.

content.thinking: this is internal monologue and should be dropped

content.text: I'll add a --dry-run flag to the migrate command. Let me start by reading the current implementation.
I'll add an opts.dryRun flag. When true, the function logs the planned changes and skips writes.

message.content: Sounds good. Make sure it works with --json output.

content.text: Got it. The --dry-run flag will respect --json by emitting a structured plan instead of human-readable text. Working on the implementation now.
